# Readiness Assessment: Data Export

**Status**: Blocked
**Evaluated**: 2026-03-17

## Criteria Check

| Criterion                    | Result  | Details                     |
|------------------------------|---------|-----------------------------|
| Zero uncertainty markers     | PENDING | Cannot evaluate — files missing |
| All units have source refs   | PENDING | Cannot evaluate — files missing |
| Unit count in range (3-8)    | PENDING | Cannot evaluate — files missing |
| No contradictions            | PENDING | Cannot evaluate — files missing |
| All required files present   | FAIL    | Missing: includes.md, sources.md |

## Recommendation

This feature is **Blocked** due to missing required files:
- `includes.md` — needed to list constituent requirement units
- `sources.md` — needed for traceability to inbox sources

Re-run `/specforge.compose` to regenerate feature directories with all required files.
